messages.text: Congratulations, Digital Forensics Investigator! You've successfully completed "The Hunt for The Null" investigation.
Your forensic analysis has yielded crucial evidence in this cyber crime case. Let me review your investigation results...

**INVESTIGATION SUMMARY**

📊 **Final Score:** [value]/[value] points
🎯 **Objectives Completed:** [value]/5
🔍 **Evidence Analyzed:** [value]/4
📋 **Compliance Score:** [value]%

[value]

Your investigation has provided valuable insights into The Null's activities and methodology.

The digital evidence you've collected and analyzed will be crucial for the prosecution of this case. Your forensic report documents the timeline, identifies the perpetrator, and establishes a clear chain of custody.
Now, let's review the detailed workflow analysis of your investigation to identify what went well and areas for improvement in your forensic methodology.
🕵️ MISSION: A cybercriminal called 'The Null' has been exposed. You have their seized devices. Your job is simple: find out who they really are.

🎯 ONE CLEAR GOAL: Discover The Null's Real Identity

✅ Real Name: ?
✅ Email Address: ?
✅ Phone Number: ?

That's it. Find these 3 pieces of information and you win.

📱 YOUR EVIDENCE (What you'll search through):

💻 Laptop Hard Drive - Contains browser data and personal files
🧠 Memory Dump - Shows what was running when seized
🌐 Network Logs - Shows communications and data transfers

⚡ You must investigate ALL 5 evidence pieces before building your report!

🔍 HOW IT WORKS (Super Simple):

1️⃣ Evidence Viewer → Investigate ALL 5 pieces of evidence
2️⃣ Extract clues from each device (laptop, memory, network)
3️⃣ Forensic Report Builder → Organize your findings
4️⃣ Submit when you have all identity pieces

🎮 STREAMLINED WORKFLOW:

• Evidence Viewer: Investigate all 5 evidence pieces
• Extract clues from each device thoroughly
• Forensic Report Builder: Drag clues into report sections
• Submit Report → WIN!

Complete investigation required before report building!

🏆 SUCCESS = Finding These 3 Things:

👤 Real Name: Alex Morrison
📧 Email: a.morrison@securemail.com
📞 Phone: +1-555-0142

Find all 3, submit your report, case closed!
Ready to be a digital detective and unmask The Null?
